ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text: 95% Irish Chicken, 5% Sweet Chilli Flavoured Glaze (Breadcrumbs [Wheat Flour (Wheat Flour, Calcium Carbonate, Iron, Niacin, Thiamin) Water, Salt, Yeast, Colour: Paprika Extract], Sugar, Salt, Spices, Dextrose, Garlic Powder, Acidity Regulator: Citric Acid; Dried Red Bell Pepper, Yeast Extract Powder, Dried Onion, Dried Green Bell Pepper, Antioxidant: Sodium Ascorbate; Colour: Paprika Extract; Barley Malt Extract).
